rulings.Case Title: PAUL EDGAR GORDON JR et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder In Defendants Ford Motor Company And General Motors Corporations Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer Venue
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, MAY 8, 2007, LINE 1. DEFENDANT DAIMLERCHRYSLER CORPORATION'S Joinder In Defendants Ford Motor Company And General Motors Corporation's Motion To Transfer Venue IS DENIED. MOVING PARTY HAS NOT ESTABLISHED THAT PLANT IS A "SHAM" DEFENDANT, NOR THAT DEFENDANT RESIDED IN SAN DIEGO. IN A MULTI-PARTY CASE SUCH AS THIS, DEFENDANT MAY SELECT THE RESIDENCE OF ANY DEFENDANT TO BRING THE CASE. =(302/PJM/AP)

IN A MULTI-PARTY CASE SUCH AS THIS, DEFENDANT MAY SELECT THE RESIDENCE OF ANY DEFENDANT TO BRING THE CASE. =(302/PJM/AP)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID KNOLMAYER VS. NANCY BEAUREGARD et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO AMENDED ANSWER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, MAY 8, 2007, LINE 6. PLAINTIFF DAVID KNOLMAYER'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED ANSWER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND THE DEMURRER TO AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES; NUMBER TWO TO STATE SEPARATELY THE STATUTE OF LIMITATION DEFENSES; NUMBER NINE TO SET FORTH FACTS THAT FORM THE BASIS FOR THE DEFENSE; NUMBER EIGHTEEN TO PLEAD SEPARATELY FACTS FOR A VOID OR VOIDABLE CONTRACT; AND NUMBER NINETEEN FOR DEFENDANT TO CONSIDER WHETHER TO RE-PLEAD. AS TO AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES: OVERRULED 1, 3, 8, 10, 15, 21, AND 22. =(302/PJM/AP)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. SY MUNDINE et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, MAY 8, 2007, LINE 10. DEFENDANT SY MUNDINE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE COURT IS REQUIRED TO STRICTLY CONSTRUE THE NOTICE. THE THREE DAY NOTICE IS INCONSISTENT AND IS NOT CURED BY THE USE OF THE PHRASE "AND/OR". THE PRIOR ACTION WAS DISMISSED AND THE MERITS OF THE CASE WERE NOT ADDRESSED. =(302/PJM/KD)
